user.title: Set up Fuel Price Watch VIC
user.description: Enter your Service Victoria Fair Fuel API consumer ID and the search radius around your location.

location.title: Choose location source
location.description: Select the entity used as the centre of the search radius. Choose 'zone.home' for a fixed location, or a device tracker for your live phone GPS.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Fuel Price API
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Consumer ID – check your Service Victoria credentials

abort.already_configured: This Consumer ID is already configured
